abstract: Kernel Enumerations  Anonymous  MBUF_CSUM_DID_DATA Enumeration CaseMBUF_CSUM_DID_DATAmacOS 10.12+MBUF_CSUM_DID_DATA = 0x0400DiscussionIndicates that the TCP or UDP checksum was calculated. The value for the checksum calculated in hardware should be passed as the second parameter of mbuf_set_csum_performed. The hardware calculated checksum value can be retrieved using the second parameter passed to mbuf_get_csum_performed. This should be done for IPv4 or IPv6.

-  MBUF_CSUM_DID_DATA 

Enumeration Case# MBUF_CSUM_DID_DATA

macOS 10.12+

```
MBUF_CSUM_DID_DATA = 0x0400
```

## [Discussion](/documentation/kernel/1644526-anonymous/mbuf_csum_did_data#discussion)

Indicates that the TCP or UDP checksum was calculated. The value for the checksum calculated in hardware should be passed as the second parameter of mbuf_set_csum_performed. The hardware calculated checksum value can be retrieved using the second parameter passed to mbuf_get_csum_performed. This should be done for IPv4 or IPv6.
